titleStmt.title: SII 15.180: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 180. (B.K. No. 200 and 201 of 1926-27.) NIḌAGUNDI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up inside the temple of Basavaṇṇa.

The first section of the record which is registered in the Annual Report on South Indian Epigraphy for 1926-27 as No. 200 of App. E., is dated Śaka 1152, Vijaya, Chaitra-paurṇami, Sunday. Śaka 1152 corresponds to the cyclic year Vikṛiti when the other details of the date do not agree. If we fix upon the cyclic year Vijaya which corresponds to Śaka 1155, the details cited regularly correspond to 1233 A.D., March 27. The second section of the record, registered in the same Report for 1926-27 as No. 201 of App. E, is dated in the cyclic year Krōdhi, Jyēshṭhapuṇṇami, Monday. As no king is mentioned and as there are no palaeographical differences the record may be assigned to the reign of Siṅghaṇa. The cyclic year may thus be equated with Śaka 1166 when the above details correspond to 1244 A.D., May 23.

The first section registers a gift of land made by the chief Karaṇa Vāmadēva to the god Svayaṁbhu Kalidēva when Mahāpradhāna, Mahāpasāyita, Sarvādhikāri Vāsudēvanāyaka was governing Kisukāḍu Seventy from its capital Eṟambarage. The gift was entrusted into the hands of the Four Hundred Mahājanas of Niḍugundi.

The second section records a gift of land for offering flowers to the same god, by Kheyya Ṭhakkura-nāyaka at the instance of Bhāskaranāyaka who bore the epithets Nara-Nārasiṁha-khaṇḍeyarāya and Maṇḍaḷika-pitāmaha. The gift was entrusted to the above Four Hundred Mahājaṉas who also made a gift of land to the mason Kallōja who built the temple of Kalidēva. Further gifts to the god Pātālabhairava and other deities are also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

raḥ .

namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī sakavarusa 1152 neya vijeya saṁvacharada cai
Itra śuddha puṇnami Ādityavāradaṁdu samadhigata paṁcamahāsabdaṁ dvārāva
tī puravarādhīśvaraṁ Ādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāsabhāskaraṁ rāyanā
rāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷa pratāpacakrava¨rtti śrī siṁhaṇadēvavijayarājyōdai tatu
pādapadmōpajīvitanu samastarājyabharabhāranirūpitanumappa śrīmanmahāpradhā
naṁ mahāpasāItaṁ paramaviśvāsi bāhattaraniyōgādhipatiUmappa sa¨rbbā
dhikāri vāsudēvanāyakaru kisukāḍa Eppattaṟavoḷage rājadhāni Ensida Eraṁ
barageya sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeytumi¨rddu kāmēśvaradēvara paścimada bāviya pratiṣṭhaya
lli nirūpitavāgi śrīkaraṇāgragaṁṇyapuṇyōdayanumappa vāmadēvanuḥ�
śrīmadanādiya Agrahāraṁ niḍuguṁdiya nānu¨rbbara keyyalu paḍedu śrī
śvayaṁbhu kalidēvara Aṁgabhōga nivēdyake koṭṭa keI Ūriṁ teṁkalu sūḍigēriya madhya va[¨r*]tti
nareyana haḷḷadiṁ teṁkalu kaṁbaḷigereya dāriIṁ paḍuvalu beḷudēvarasa
rēnayyaṁgaḷa satadoḷage mattaru 12 maṁ sa¨rbbābhādha parihāravāgi nānu¨rbbaru
pratipāḷisuvaru . svasti śrīmatu krōdhi saṁvacharada jēṣṭa suda
puṇnami sōmavāradaṁdu . śrīmatu naranārasiṁhva khaṁḍerāya maṁḍaḷikapi
tāmaha bhāśkaranāyakara nirūpadiṁ kheyyaṭhakuranāyakanu nānu¨rbbara saṁnidhā
nadalli śrī svayaṁbhu kalidēvarige puṣpakke Ā keIṁ teṁkalu koṭṭa keI matta
ru 3 maṁ . nānu¨rbaru pratipālisuvaru . śrī kalidēvara
dēvālyava māḍitake nānu¨rbbaru kū¨rttu baḍagi kalōjaṁge Ā caṁdrā¨rkka dēvarige besa
keIvaṁtāgi koṭṭa keI Ūriṁ teṁkalu jakkilegēriya madhyavatti śrīgaṁdhada keIṁ teṁka
beṇṇeyagereya dāriIṁ paḍuvalu beḷudēva rēvarasariṁ baḍagalu kaṁmmagēriya
madhyavattiIṁ mūḍalu matta 6 kaṁ Aruvaṇa mattaroṁdakaṁ haṇamaṁ tettu Uṁbanu .
© svasti śrīmadanādiya Agrahāraṁ niḍuguṁdiya rakṣāpāḷakanappa Ūriṁ mū
ḍalu Isānyadalli dakṣiṇāmukhada śrī śvayaṁbhu pātāḷabhairavadēva¨rgge
śrīmatu vāmanadēvana Aṁgabhōganivēdyake koṭṭa keI Ūriṁ teṁkalu kaṁmagē
riya madhyavatti Allikalidēvara keyiṁ paḍuvalu . nareyaṁgalla dāriyiṁ mūḍalu . hiriya
kauveya keIṁ teṁkalu matteru 5 dake Aruvaṇa mattariṁge haṇa 1 . maṁ tiṟuUdu . śrī
matu Iśvarabhāḷabiṁdu (.) saṁjanitekāruṇyabhāve nānū¨rbbara kuladēvate Ensida hiriyaka U
vege vāmadēvanu dēviya śrīkā¨ryyake koṭṭa keI Ūriṁ teṁkalu kaṁmegēriya
madhyavattiya negeyana haḷḷadiṁ teṁkalu . kalidēvara keIṁ paḍuvalu . bhairavadēvara keIṁ ba
ḍagalu . paḍuvalu nareyaṁgalla dāriIṁ mūḍalu . mattaru 4 kake Aruvaṇa mattariṁge
haṇa 1 . maṁ Ā dēviya maḍavari bhīmeyanāyaka tettuṁbanu .
Digital edition of SII 15.180 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
